body:
Hi %contact_first_name%,

I noticed it’s been a bit since you’ve checked your saved homes — want to pick up where you left off?

Click below to see what’s new:
👉 [%custom_ylopo_listing_alert%]

If you tell me your ideal area or budget, I’ll make sure your alerts match perfectly.
subject: Re: Let’s get your home search back on track
